image_height: 1200

debug: False
resume_training: False
for_scenestate: True

new_label_to_generic_label_path: preprocess/metadata/chinese_idx_to_generic_label.json
output_dir: datasets/results/generate_anno/mix_arch_diningroom
pix_ratio_threshold: preprocess/metadata/chinese_pix_ratio_threshold.json

semantic_map_dir: datas

# Data Processing Configuration
# Configuration for processing scene data and generating visualizations

debug: False
image_width: 1200
image_height: 1200
floor_size: 12
bbox: False

# Visualization options
use_gt: True
use_pred: False
retrieve_3d: False
valid_inst_threshold: 0.001
process_gt: True
w_floor: False
no_floor: False
w_arch: False

# Configuration file paths - update these to match your setup
pix_ratio_threshold: preprocess/metadata/unified_pix_ratio_threshold.json
new_label_to_generic_label_path: preprocess/metadata/unified_idx_to_generic_label_w_arch.json

# Output directory - specify where results should be saved
output_dir: datasets/results/scenestate_gt_square_floor/livingroom/val

# Example configuration file for unified evaluation pipeline
# Modify the paths below to match your data directories

# General settings
output_directory: 'evaluation_results'
verbose: true

# Control which evaluations to run
run_oob: true
run_sca: true
run_fid: true
run_kl: true

# Out-of-Boundary (OOB) Evaluation Settings
oob:
  input_folder: 'datasets/results/scenestate/mix_arch_bedroom'

# Scene Classification Accuracy (SCA) Evaluation Settings
sca:
  path_to_train_renderings: 'datasets/results/rendering/gt/bedroom/train_val_semantic'
  path_to_test_renderings: 'datasets/results/rendering/gt/bedroom/test_semantic'
  path_to_synthesized_renderings: 'datasets/mixed_con_results/renderings/mix_arch/bedroom'
  batch_size: 256
  num_workers: 0
  epochs: 10
  device: null  # auto-detect (use 'cuda' or 'cpu' to force)

# FID/KID Evaluation Settings
fid:
  path_to_real_renderings: 'datasets/results/rendering/gt/bedroom/test_semantic'
  path_to_synthesized_renderings: 'datasets/mixed_con_results/renderings/mix_arch/bedroom'
  device: null  # auto-detect
  num_iterations: 10
  temp_dir_base: null  # use system temp directory

# KL Divergence Evaluation Settings
kl:
  gt_scenestate_dir: 'd

output_dir: inference_output/sldn_layout_eval

gt_data_dir: datasets/_tmp_parse_floorplan_map_full
gt_template: chinese_{split}_128x128.npy
split: test

pred_dir: inference_output/job1133953_few_best/test
pred_glob: "*_pred.npy"
pred_index_regex: sample_(\d+)
name_filter: no_text
max_samples: 0
channel_index: 1

id2c_path: my_tools/id2c.json
c2rgb_path: my_tools/c2rgb.json
ignore_label_names:
  - void
  - floor
  - door
  - window

metrics:
  - iou
  - oob_2d
  - count_2d
  - oar_2d
  - nav_2d
  - fid_kid
  - sca
  - ckl

min_instance_pixels: 4

count_2d:
  connectivity: 8

oar_2d:
  connectivity: 8
  wall_band_pixels: 3
  near_opening_pixels: 6
  middle_threshold_ratio: 0.18
  supported_relations:
    - against_wall
    - near_door
    - near_window
    - middle_of_room

nav_2d:
  connectivity: 8

fid:
  device: null
  num_iterations: 10
  temp_dir_base: null

sca:
  batch_size: 256
  num_workers: 0
  epochs: 10
  device: null
